channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Low-hanging branches and fallen fruit obstructing pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
The branches are hanging low over the public pavement and the tree does not appear to have been maintained. Ripe fruit is falling onto the pavement, creating mess and potential slip/accessibility issues. The tree needs attention as it is affecting the p

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coopersale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 2nd July
item.description:
I’m writing to report a recurring fly-tipping problem at the bin collection point near my property. This has become a weekly problem, with rubbish repeatedly dumped beside the bins between collections. It’s causing an eyesore, blocking pavement access, an

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandringham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 2nd July
item.description:
Street light is not working opposite 24 Lucas Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lucas Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gipsy Hill SE19 a few yards from Gipsy Road junction is, 2nd July
item.description:
Gipsy Hill SE19 a few yards from Gipsy Road junction is a traffic island. On said island one of the Keep Left boards is broken – lying flat and the second one could well be also broken. Please action repairs.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 129, Gipsy Hill, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting, 2nd July
item.description:
Two inappropriate signs loosely attached to lamp posts outside 7 & 19 Ryecroft Road. Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Ryecroft Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown shrub and hedges footpath blocked, 2nd July
item.description:
Tree and hedges overgrown and blocking footpath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Finsbury Way, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass seeds, 2nd July
item.description:
Every year my dog and multiple other dogs are taken to the vet’s because of the grass seeds left to grow for wildlife. There are plenty of other plants for the wildlife that don’t danger our pets. Dogs die because of grass seeds, I’ve also spent ££££ on vet bills as reoccurring injuries aren’t covered on insurance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blenheim Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crystal Palace Park Road SE26 between streetlight, 2nd July
item.description:
Crystal Palace Park Road SE26 between streetlight columns ID numbered 27 and 28 is a green footpath box which is tagged. Google Streetview: https://www.google.com/maps/place/56+Crystal+Palace+Park+Rd,+London+SE26+6UG/@51.4208143,-0.0616141,3a,75y,47.46h,91.97t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1sZ-ib9jIDH0GelBv1P6T4HQ!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D-1.9686784066240506%26panoid%3DZ-ib9jIDH0GelBv1P6T4HQ%26yaw%3D47.4617041378579!7i16384!8i8192!4m6!3m5!1s0x48760165b44c3c79:0x89efb66bbafe6f4e!8m2!3d51.4228754!4d-0.0626819!16s%2Fg%2F11c22qb2f7?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDYyOS4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Crystal Palace Park Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Childs play area . Broken and dangerous. Large screws broken play equipment. In disrepair, 2nd July
item.description:
Play area in poor condition. Dangerous and broken .large screws broken wood ...hazardous to young children. Needs attention asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Norbert Green, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees overhanging pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
Several trees are drooping over the pavement. As the other side of the road pavement is closed due to gas works, this is rather urgent.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sundridge Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barriers around pothole moved, 2nd July
item.description:
Barriers have shifted so vehicles driving right next/over to the pot hole. I saw a cyclist have a near miss this evening.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Hamlet Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fire access and 4 garages blocked, 2nd July
item.description:
Emergency access and garages blocked

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Mattress abandoned on road, 2nd July

Mattress dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Olney Road, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned Mattress, 2nd July

Abandoned mattress on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Belfast Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Broken glass across. Pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
Outside Sainsbury’s area. Multiple broken bottles acrosss pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Queen Victoria Street, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lightning flashing on and off on Sturgeon Rd., 2nd July
item.description:
The street lightning is not working, it is flashing on and off. It's been more than 1 week now and the lights comes in my house at night. It is disturbing.,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sturgeon Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped at back of houses, 2nd July
item.description:
I have reported this and you closed case saying it wasn’t your land so please explain why I had a letter telling me to remove rubbish that I had arranged to have taken away or I would be fined by Bromley council this is your land and you have previously fined other neighbours for dumping there before

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensbourne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Anti social, 2nd July
item.description:
We have noticed up 9pm no one should be playing we are trying to sleep windows are open or not but can hear them they a tally live in the houses m have there own garden we in the flats don't play in the ball court after 9 or it would be reported sane way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Longton Avenue, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 26 Trewsbury Road, 2nd July
item.description:
The hedge of this property has now claimed over half the width of the pavement. Could we have the pavement returned to public use please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Allendale Close, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive fly tip by resident 9 The Close, 2nd July
item.description:
Fridge couches rubbish bags etc dumped outside house

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Close, Elmers End, Greater London
